message:
refactor(fusion): extract NormBounds for allocation-free score normalization; switch to AHashMap in searcher

- Extract NormBounds struct computing min/range/t in one pass without
  allocating Vec<f32>, then applying normalization inline during HashMap
  insertion — eliminates 2 intermediate allocations and 4 data passes
- Improve capacity estimation with 1.3x overlap heuristic
- Switch std HashMap/HashSet to ahash in vector_hits_to_scored_results

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
